<!DOCTYPE html>

<html lang="ar" dir="rtl">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1">
<title>مطعم RIZA</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Tajawal:wght@400;700;900&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box}
body{font-family:'Tajawal',sans-serif;background:#0c0905;overflow-x:hidden}
.hero{position:relative;height:100vh;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;overflow:hidden}
.hbg{position:absolute;inset:0;background:url('data:image/jpeg;base64,') center/cover no-repeat;filter:brightness(.5);animation:zoom 20s ease-in-out infinite alternate}
@keyframes zoom{from{transform:scale(1)}to{transform:scale(1.08)}}
.hov{position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(to bottom,rgba(0,0,0,.05),rgba(0,0,0,.4) 55%,rgba(0,0,0,.92))}
.hc{position:relative;z-index:2;text-align:center;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:16px;padding:0 20px}
.lb{width:118px;height:118px;border-radius:50%;border:2px solid rgba(201,146,42,.5);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;background:rgba(0,0,0,.3);backdrop-filter:blur(6px);animation:glow 3s ease-in-out infinite}
@keyframes glow{0%,100%{box-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(201,146,42,.3)}50%{box-shadow:0 0 40px rgba(201,146,42,.6)}}
.ln{font-family:Georgia,serif;font-size:2.4rem;color:#fff;letter-spacing:6px;text-shadow:0 0 25px rgba(201,146,42,.8)}
.st{font-size:.8rem;color:rgba(201,146,42,.85);letter-spacing:3px}
.mb{background:rgba(201,146,42,.12);border:1.5px solid rgba(201,146,42,.55);border-radius:50px;padding:13px 42px;color:#fff;font-family:'Tajawal',sans-serif;font-size:1.08rem;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;backdrop-filter:blur(10px);transition:.3s;animation:pulse 2.5s infinite}
@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(201,146,42,.35)}50%{box-shadow:0 0 0 14px rgba(201,146,42,0)}}
.mb:hover{background:rgba(201,146,42,.28);transform:scale(1.04)}
.srow{display:flex;gap:16px;justify-content:center}
.slink{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:5px;text-decoration:none;color:#fff;font-size:.68rem;transition:.3s}
.slink:hover{transform:scale(1.1)}
.sico{width:44px;height:44px;border-radius:50%;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.25);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;backdrop-filter:blur(8px);transition:.3s}
.slink.ph .sico{background:rgba(201,146,42,.2);border-color:rgba(201,146,42,.4)}
.slink.wa .sico{background:rgba(37,211,102,.2);border-color:rgba(37,211,102,.4)}
.slink.fb .sico{background:rgba(24,119,242,.2);border-color:rgba(24,119,242,.4)}
.slink.tt .sico{background:rgba(255,0,80,.15);border-color:rgba(255,0,80,.35)}
.slink:hover .sico{transform:scale(1.1);filter:brightness(1.3)}
.cart-fab{position:fixed;bottom:24px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);z-index:300;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#25D366,#1da851);border:none;border-radius:50px;padding:13px 26px;color:#fff;font-family:'Tajawal',sans-serif;font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;display:none;align-items:center;gap:10px;box-shadow:0 6px 24px rgba(37,211,102,.45);transition:.3s}
.cart-fab.show{display:flex}
.cart-badge{background:#fff;color:#1da851;border-radius:50%;width:22px;height:22px;font-size:.78rem;font-weight:900;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center}
.ov{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:200;display:flex;align-items:flex-end;justify-content:center;visibility:hidden;opacity:0;transition:.35s}
.ov.open{visibility:visible;opacity:1}
.bd{position:absolute;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.75);backdrop-filter:blur(10px)}
.pn{position:relative;z-index:2;width:100%;max-width:520px;background:#141008;border-radius:26px 26px 0 0;border-top:1px solid rgba(201,146,42,.3);max-height:90vh;overflow-y:auto;transform:translateY(100%);transition:transform .5s cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1)}
.ov.open .pn{transform:translateY(0)}
.pn::-webkit-scrollbar{width:3px}.pn::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:rgba(201,146,42,.3);border-radius:3px}
.ph{position:relative;height:150px;overflow:hidden;border-radius:26px 26px 0 0}
.ph img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;filter:brightness(.4)}
.pho{position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(to bottom,transparent,#141008)}
.phc{position:absolute;inset:0;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:4px}
.dh{width:36px;height:4px;background:rgba(201,146,42,.4);border-radius:2px;margin-bottom:6px}
.pl{font-family:Georgia,serif;font-size:1.85rem;color:#fff;letter-spacing:5px;text-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(201,146,42,.9)}
.ps{font-size:.72rem;color:rgba(201,146,42,.8);letter-spacing:3px}
.cx{position:absolute;top:12px;left:12px;width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:50%;border:1px solid rgba(201,146,42,.3);background:rgba(0,0,0,.4);color:rgba(201,146,42,.8);cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:.3s;font-size:.95rem;border:none}
.cx:hover{transform:rotate(90deg);background:rgba(201,146,42,.25)}
.secs{padding:6px 12px 100px}
.sb{margin-bottom:5px}
.sh{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:11px;padding:11px 12px;border-radius:13px;cursor:pointer;transition:.25s;user-select:none}
.sh:hover{background:rgba(201,146,42,.07)}
.si{width:44px;height:44px;border-radius:11px;object-fit:cover;border:1px solid rgba(201,146,42,.2);flex-shrink:0}
.si-info{flex:1}.si-info b{display:block;font-size:.93rem;color:#fff;font-weight:700}.si-info small{color:rgba(255,255,255,.33);font-size:.73rem}
.ch{color:rgba(201,146,42,.5);transition:.3s;font-size:1.2rem}
.il{display:none;padding:4px 4px 8px}
.il.open{display:block}
.ir{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding:9px 12px;border-radius:10px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.04);background:rgba(255,255,255,.02);margin-bottom:4px;transition:.2s;gap:8px}
.ir:hover{background:rgba(201,146,42,.07);border-color:rgba(201,146,42,.18)}
.in{font-size:.88rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.85);flex:1}
.ir2{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;flex-shrink:0}
.pr{font-size:.8rem;font-weight:700;color:#f0c060;background:rgba(201,146,42,.1);padding:2px 9px;border-radius:20px;border:1px solid rgba(201,146,42,.2);white-space:nowrap}
.add-btn{width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(201,146,42,.2);border:1px solid rgba(201,146,42,.4);color:#f0c060;font-size:1.2rem;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:.25s;font-weight:900;line-height:1;font-family:'Tajawal',sans-serif}
.add-btn:hover{background:rgba(201,146,42,.4);transform:scale(1.15)}
.gl{height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,rgba(201,146,42,.2),transparent);margin:2px 12px 4px}
.cov{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:400;display:flex;align-items:flex-end;justify-content:center;visibility:hidden;opacity:0;transition:.35s}
.cov.open{visibility:visible;opacity:1}
.cbd{position:absolute;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.8);backdrop-filter:blur(12px)}
.cpn{position:relative;z-index:2;width:100%;max-width:520px;background:#141008;border-radius:26px 26px 0 0;border-top:1px solid rgba(37,211,102,.4);max-height:80vh;overflow-y:auto;transform:translateY(100%);transition:transform .5s cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1);padding-bottom:20px}
.cov.open .cpn{transform:translateY(0)}
.cpn::-webkit-scrollbar{width:3px}.cpn::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:rgba(37,211,102,.3);border-radius:3px}
.ch2{padding:16px 16px 10px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06)}
.ch2 h3{color:#fff;font-size:1rem;font-weight:700}
.clr{background:none;border:1px solid rgba(255,80,80,.3);color:rgba(255,100,100,.7);border-radius:20px;padding:4px 12px;font-family:'Tajawal',sans-serif;font-size:.78rem;cursor:pointer}
.cx2{width:30px;height:30px;border-radius:50%;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.2);background:rgba(255,255,255,.07);color:rgba(255,255,255,.7);cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:.9rem}
.cempty{text-align:center;color:rgba(255,255,255,.3);font-size:.9rem;padding:40px 20px}
.ci{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:10px 16px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.04);gap:8px}
.ci-name{color:rgba(255,255,255,.85);font-size:.86rem;flex:1}
.ci-ctrl{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;flex-shrink:0}
.ci-price{color:#f0c060;font-size:.82rem;font-weight:700;min-width:55px;text-align:center}
.ci-qty{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px}
.qbtn{width:26px;height:26px;border-radius:50%;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.2);background:rgba(255,255,255,.07);color:#fff;font-size:1rem;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:700;font-family:'Tajawal',sans-serif}
.qnum{color:#fff;font-size:.9rem;font-weight:700;min-width:18px;text-align:center}
.ctotal{padding:12px 16px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;border-top:1px solid rgba(201,146,42,.25);margin-top:4px}
.ctotal span{color:rgba(255,255,255,.7);font-size:.9rem}
.ctotal b{color:#f0c060;font-size:1rem}
.confirm-btn{margin:10px 16px 0;width:calc(100% - 32px);padding:14px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#25D366,#1da851);border:none;border-radius:14px;color:#fff;font-family:'Tajawal',sans-serif;font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:10px;box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(37,211,102,.35)}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<section class="hero">
  <div class="hbg"></div>
  <div class="hov"></div>
  <div class="hc">
    <div class="lb"><span class="ln">RIZA</span></div>
    <p class="st">مطعم وكافيه</p>
    <button class="mb" onclick="openMenu()">📋 قائمة الطعام</button>
    <div class="srow">
      <a class="slink ph" href="tel:0927777251">
        <div class="sico"><svg width="22" height="22" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="#fff"><path d="M6.62 10.79c1.44 2.83 3.76 5.14 6.59 6.59l2.2-2.2c.27-.27.67-.36 1.02-.24 1.12.37 2.33.57 3.57.57.55 0 1 .45 1 1V20c0 .55-.45 1-1 1-9.39 0-17-7.61-17-17 0-.55.45-1 1-1h3.5c.55 0 1 .45 1 1 0 1.25.2 2.45.57 3.57.11.35.03.74-.25 1.02l-2.2 2.2z"/></svg></div><span>اتصال</span>
      </a>
      <a class="slink wa" href="https://wa.me/218927777251" target="_blank">
        <div class="sico"><svg width="22" height="22" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="#fff"><path d="M17.472 14.382c-.297-.149-1.758-.867-2.03-.967-.273-.099-.471-.148-.67.15-.197.297-.767.966-.94 1.164-.173.199-.347.223-.644.075-.297-.15-1.255-.463-2.39-1.475-.883-.788-1.48-1.761-1.653-2.059-.173-.297-.018-.458.13-.606.134-.133.298-.347.446-.52.149-.174.198-.298.298-.497.099-.198.05-.371-.025-.52-.075-.149-.669-1.612-.916-2.207-.242-.579-.487-.5-.669-.51-.173-.008-.371-.01-.57-.01-.198 0-.52.074-.792.372-.272.297-1.04 1.016-1.04 2.479 0 1.462 1.065 2.875 1.213 3.074.149.198 2.096 3.2 5.077 4.487.709.306 1.262.489 1.694.625.712.227 1.36.195 1.871.118.571-.085 1.758-.719 2.006-1.413.248-.694.248-1.289.173-1.413-.074-.124-.272-.198-.57-.347m-5.421 7.403h-.004a9.87 9.87 0 01-5.031-1.378l-.361-.214-3.741.982.998-3.648-.235-.374a9.86 9.86 0 01-1.51-5.26c.001-5.45 4.436-9.884 9.888-9.884 2.64 0 5.122 1.03 6.988 2.898a9.825 9.825 0 012.893 6.994c-.003 5.45-4.437 9.884-9.885 9.884m8.413-18.297A11.815 11.815 0 0012.05 0C5.495 0 .16 5.335.157 11.892c0 2.096.547 4.142 1.588 5.945L.057 24l6.305-1.654a11.882 11.882 0 005.683 1.448h.005c6.554 0 11.89-5.335 11.893-11.893a11.821 11.821 0 00-3.48-8.413z"/></svg></div><span>واتساب</span>
      </a>
      <a class="slink fb" href="https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61570992578274" target="_blank">
        <div class="sico"><svg width="22" height="22" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="#fff"><path d="M24 12.073C24 5.405 18.627 0 12 0S0 5.405 0 12.073C0 18.1 4.388 23.094 10.125 24v-8.437H7.078v-3.49h3.047V9.41c0-3.025 1.792-4.697 4.533-4.697 1.312 0 2.686.236 2.686.236v2.97h-1.514c-1.491 0-1.956.93-1.956 1.886v2.268h3.328l-.532 3.49h-2.796V24C19.612 23.094 24 18.1 24 12.073z"/></svg></div><span>فيسبوك</span>
      </a>
      <a class="slink tt" href="https://www.tiktok.com/@riza.restaurant7" target="_blank">
        <div class="sico"><svg width="22" height="22" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="#fff"><path d="M19.59 6.69a4.83 4.83 0 01-3.77-4.25V2h-3.45v13.67a2.89 2.89 0 01-2.88 2.5 2.89 2.89 0 01-2.89-2.89 2.89 2.89 0 012.89-2.89c.28 0 .54.04.79.1V9.01a6.27 6.27 0 00-.79-.05 6.34 6.34 0 00-6.34 6.34 6.34 6.34 0 006.34 6.34 6.34 6.34 0 006.33-6.34V8.69a8.18 8.18 0 004.78 1.52V6.75a4.85 4.85 0 01-1.01-.06z"/></svg></div><span>تيك توك</span>
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<button class="cart-fab" id="cartFab" onclick="openCart()">
  🛒 سلة الطلبات <span class="cart-badge" id="cartCount">0</span>
</button>

<div class="ov" id="menuOv">
  <div class="bd" onclick="closeMenu()"></div>
  <div class="pn">
    <div class="ph">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="RIZA">
      <div class="pho"></div>
      <div class="phc"><div class="dh"></div><div class="pl">RIZA</div><div class="ps">قائمة الطعام</div></div>
      <button class="cx" onclick="closeMenu()">✕</button>
    </div>
    <div class="secs"><div class="sb" id="s0">
<div class="sh" onclick="tog(0)">
<img class="si" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="🍔 الغربي والسناكات">
<div class="si-info"><b>🍔 الغربي والسناكات</b><small>ستيك · كرسبي · فاهيتا</small></div>
<span class="ch" id="ch0">&#8249;</span>
</div>
<div class="il" id="il0"><div class="ir"><span class="in">بيف ستيك</span><div class="ir2"><span class="pr">70 د.ل</span><button class="add-btn" onclick="addItem('بيف ستيك',70,this)">+</button></div></div>
<div class="ir"><span class="in">بريست تشيكن</span><div class="ir2"><span class="pr">45 د.ل</span><button class="add-btn" onclick="addItem('بريست تشيكن',45,this)">+</button></div></div>
<div class="ir"><span class="in">إسكالوب</span><div class="ir2"><span class="pr">40 د.ل</span><button class="add-btn" onclick="addItem('إسكالوب',40,this)">+</button></div></div>
<div class="ir"><span class="in">كوردن بلو</span><div class="ir2"><span class="pr">55 د.ل</span><button class="add-btn" onclick="addItem('كوردن بلو',55,this)">+</button></div></div>
<div class="ir"><span class="in">جنبري بانيه</span><div class="ir2"><span class="pr">60 د.ل</span><button class="add-btn" onclick="addItem('جنبري بانيه',60,this)">+</button></div></div>
<div class="ir"><span class="in">تشيكن كرسبي</span><div class="ir2"><span class="pr">40 د.ل</span><button class="add-btn" onclick="addItem('تشيكن كرسبي',40,this)">+</button></div></div>
<div class="ir"><span class="in">وجبة فاهيتا لحم</span><div class="ir2"><span class="pr">50 د.ل</span><button class="add-btn" onclick="addItem('وجبة فاهيتا لحم',50,this)">+</button></div></div>
<div class="ir"><span class="in">وجبة فاهيتا دجاج</span><div class="ir2"><span class="pr">40 د.ل</span><button class="add-btn" onclick="addItem('وجبة فاهيتا دجاج',40,this)">+</button></div></div>
</div>
</div><div class="gl"></div>
<div class="sb" id="s1">
<div class="sh" onclick="tog(1)">
<img class="si" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="🍝 الإيطالي">
<div class="si-info"><b>🍝 الإيطالي</b><small>باستا · لازانيا · ريزوتو</small></div>
<span class="ch" id="ch1">&#8249;</span>
</div>
<div class="il" id="il1"><div class="ir"><span class="in">فيتوتشيني القريدو دجاج</span><div class="ir2"><span class="pr">45 د.ل</span><button class="add-btn" onclick="addItem('فيتوتشيني القريدو دجاج',45,this)">+</button></div></div>
<div class="ir"><span class="in">سباغيتي بولونيز</span><div class="ir2"><span class="pr">45 د.ل</span><button class="add-btn" onclick="addItem('سباغيتي بولونيز',45,this)">+</button></div></div>
<div class="ir"><span class="in">سباغيتي بفواكه البحر</span><div class="ir2"><span class="pr">50 د.ل</span><button class="add-btn" onclick="addItem('سباغيتي بفواكه البحر',50,this)">+</button></div></div>
<div class="ir"><span class="in">سباغيتي جنبري وايت صوص</span><div class="ir2"><span class="pr">55 د.ل</span><button class="add-btn" onclick="addItem('سباغيتي جنبري وايت صوص',55,this)">+</button></div></div>
<div class="ir"><span class="in">بيني أرابياتا</span><div class="ir2"><span class="pr">40 د.ل</span><button class="add-btn" onclick="addItem('بيني أرابياتا',40,this)">+</button></div></div>
<div class="ir"><span class="in">بيني بيستو قطر</span><div class="ir2"><span class="pr">40 د.ل</span><button class="add-btn" onclick="addItem('بيني بيستو قطر',40,this)">+</button></div></div>
<div class="ir"><span class="in">بيني دجاج بنك صوص</span><div class="ir2"><span class="pr">45 د.ل</span><button class="add-btn" onclick="addItem('بيني دجاج بنك صوص',45,this)">+</button></div></div>
<div class="ir"><span class="in">ريزوتو بومودورو</span><div class="ir2"><span class="pr">45 د.ل</span><button class="add-btn" onclick="addItem('ريزوتو بومودورو',45,this)">+</button></div></div>
<div class="ir"><span class="in">ماك آند تشيز</span><div class="ir2"><span class="pr">40 د.ل</span><button class="add-btn" onclick="addItem('ماك آند تشيز',40,this)">+</button></div></div>
<div class="ir"><span class="in">لازانيا لحم</span><div class="ir2"><span class="pr">50 د.ل</span><button class="add-btn" onclick="addItem('لازانيا لحم',50,this)">+</button></div></div>
</div>
</div><div class="gl"></div>
<div class="sb" id="s2">
<div class="sh" onclick="tog(2)">
<img class="si" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="🥪 سندوتشات الغربي">
<div class="si-info"><b>🥪 سندوتشات الغربي</b><small>برغر · فاهيتا · تاكوس</small></div>
<span class="ch" id="ch2">&#8249;</span>
</div>
<div class="il" id="il2"><div class="ir"><span class="in">فاهيتا دجاج</span><div class="ir2"><span class="pr">20 د.ل</span><button class="add-btn" onclick="addItem('فاهيتا دجاج',20,this)">+</button></div></div>
<div class="ir"><span class="in">فاهيتا لحم</span><div class="ir2"><span class="pr">25 د.ل</span><button class="add-btn" onclick="addItem('فاهيتا لحم',25,this)">+</button></div></div>
<div class="ir"><span class="in">تاكوس لحم</span><div class="ir2"><span class="pr">30 د.ل</span><button class="add-btn" onclick="addItem('تاكوس لحم',30,this)">+</button></div></div>
<div class="ir"><span class="in">تاكوس دجاج</span><div class="ir2"><span class="pr">25 د.ل</span><button class="add-btn" onclick="addItem('تاكوس دجاج',25,this)">+</button></div></div>
<div class="ir"><span class="in">تشكن كرسبي</span><div class="ir2"><span class="pr">20 د.ل</span><button class="add-btn" onclick="addItem('تشكن كرسبي',20,this)">+</button></div></div>

<div class="cov" id="cartOv">
  <div class="cbd" onclick="closeCart()"></div>
  <div class="cpn">
    <div class="ch2">
      <h3>🛒 سلة الطلبات</h3>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center">
        <button class="clr" onclick="clearCart()">مسح الكل</button>
        <button class="cx2" onclick="closeCart()">✕</button>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div id="cartItems"><div class="cempty">السلة فارغة 🛒</div></div>
    <div id="cartFooter"></div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
var cart = [];

function addItem(name, price, btn) {
  var ex = null;
  for (var i = 0; i < cart.length; i++) {
    if (cart[i].name === name) { ex = cart[i]; break; }
  }
  if (ex) { ex.qty++; } else { cart.push({name: name, price: price, qty: 1}); }
  updateFab();
  if (btn) {
    btn.style.background = 'rgba(37,211,102,0.5)';
    setTimeout(function() { btn.style.background = ''; }, 400);
  }
}

function updateFab() {
  var total = 0;
  for (var i = 0; i < cart.length; i++) total += cart[i].qty;
  var fab = document.getElementById('cartFab');
  document.getElementById('cartCount').textContent = total;
  if (total > 0) { fab.classList.add('show'); } else { fab.classList.remove('show'); }
}

function renderCart() {
  var el = document.getElementById('cartItems');
  var ft = document.getElementById('cartFooter');
  if (cart.length === 0) {
    el.innerHTML = '<div class="cempty">السلة فارغة 🛒</div>';
    ft.innerHTML = '';
    return;
  }
  var html = '';
  var total = 0;
  for (var i = 0; i < cart.length; i++) {
    var item = cart[i];
    total += item.price * item.qty;
    html += '<div class="ci"><span class="ci-name">' + item.name + '</span><div class="ci-ctrl"><span class="ci-price">' + (item.price * item.qty) + ' د.ل</span><div class="ci-qty"><button class="qbtn" onclick="changeQty(' + i + ',-1)">−</button><span class="qnum">' + item.qty + '</span><button class="qbtn" onclick="changeQty(' + i + ',1)">+</button></div></div></div>';
  }
  el.innerHTML = html;
  ft.innerHTML = '<div class="ctotal"><span>الإجمالي:</span><b>' + total + ' د.ل</b></div><button class="confirm-btn" onclick="confirmOrder()">💬 تأكيد الطلب عبر واتساب</button>';
}

function changeQty(i, d) {
  cart[i].qty += d;
  if (cart[i].qty <= 0) cart.splice(i, 1);
  updateFab();
  renderCart();
}

function clearCart() {
  cart = [];
  updateFab();
  renderCart();
}

function confirmOrder() {
  var lines = '';
  var total = 0;
  for (var i = 0; i < cart.length; i++) {
    lines += '%0A• ' + encodeURIComponent(cart[i].name) + ' × ' + cart[i].qty + ' = ' + (cart[i].price * cart[i].qty) + ' د.ل';
    total += cart[i].price * cart[i].qty;
  }
  var msg = encodeURIComponent('مرحباً مطعم RIZA 👋%0Aأريد تأكيد الطلب:') + lines + encodeURIComponent('%0A%0A💰 الإجمالي: ' + total + ' د.ل%0Aشكراً 🙏');
  window.open('https://wa.me/218927777251?text=' + msg, '_blank');
}

function openMenu() {
  document.getElementById('menuOv').classList.add('open');
  document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
}
function closeMenu() {
  document.getElementById('menuOv').classList.remove('open');
  document.body.style.overflow = '';
}
function openCart() {
  document.getElementById('cartOv').classList.add('open');
  renderCart();
}
function closeCart() {
  document.getElementById('cartOv').classList.remove('open');
}
function tog(i) {
  var il = document.getElementById('il' + i);
  var ch = document.getElementById('ch' + i);
  var isOpen = il.classList.contains('open');
  var allIl = document.querySelectorAll('.il');
  var allCh = document.querySelectorAll('.ch');
  for (var j = 0; j < allIl.length; j++) { allIl[j].classList.remove('open'); allCh[j].style.transform = ''; }
  if (!isOpen) { il.classList.add('open'); ch.style.transform = 'rotate(-90deg)'; }
}
document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) { if (e.key === 'Escape') { closeMenu(); closeCart(); } });
</script>

</body>
</html>
